title: Zensar Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Zensar Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
